subcodes.first_line: O thou servant who gazeth upon the Countenance! We have sent unto thee a breath from the breaths of the Garment, and dispatched it unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الناظر الی الوجه قد ارسلنا الیک نفحه من نفحات القمیص و بعثناها علی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
